findings.html: Tips and Trick for working with the JWST Pipeline
findings.problemShort: elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionShort: ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets wcag 2 aa minimum contrast ratio thresholds
findings.solutionLong:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.31 (foreground color: #176de8, background color: #fff3cd, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

issue.title: Accessibility issue: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds on /notebook-ci-testing/notebooks/MIRI/Coronagraphy/JWPipeNB-MIRI-Coron.html
